name: diag_ClosedChannelInd
title: diag_ClosedChannelInd
description: This function communicates to CANoe that the communication channel is not longer available, e.g. the tester closed the channel or a non reparable error occurred.
The CAPL program first has to call diag_SetupChannelCon before further data can be sent.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The qualifier of the ECU whose channel has been closed.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
